banner.title: Fresh Groceries Delivered at Amazing Prices
banner.description: Enjoy the best deals on top-quality groceries, delivered right to your doorstep. Shop now and save 5% on your first order!

galeriMaduku.title: Premium Selected Honey from Galeri Maduku
galeriMaduku.description: Guaranteed quality in every drop — pure honey, carefully handpicked from trusted local beekeepers.

categories.title: Shop by Categories
categories.subtitle: Explore a curated collection of top-quality products, tailored to your every need.

products.title: Recommended Product
products.subtitle: Explore our top picks of high-quality products just for you

brands.title: Shop by Brands
brands.subtitle: Discover top brands and shop the best products from trusted brands.

items.question: Are organic products available?
items.answer: Yes, there are various options of organic fruits and vegetables clearly marked in the product categories.

items.question: How to place an order?
items.answer: Orders can be placed easily and quickly through the website or app.

items.question: Is there a minimum purchase for delivery?
items.answer: Yes, the minimum purchase for delivery service is Rp 200,000.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery time depends on location, usually within 1-3 business days.

items.question: Can I pick up my order at the store?
items.answer: Yes. Choose the in-store pickup option when ordering, then collect your order at our store address.

items.question: How do I earn points?
items.answer: You earn points by reviewing products you've purchased. Each review gives points that can be redeemed as a discount on your next order.

brands.title: All Brands

orders.title: Your Orders
